domain: Gamified Personal Development SaaS (Solo Leveling aesthetic)

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter uppercase text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-primary to-blue-500 font-bold
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight text-primary font-bold uppercase

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: THE CONTROL ROOM (Dense, technical grid for stats, with asymmetrical focus on main quest)
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use p-4 to p-8 for dense data cards. Use massive padding (p-16+) for empty states or hero 'Awakening' screens.
layout_and_spacing.borders_and_radii: Angular, sharp edges or maximum 4px radius (rounded-sm) to maintain the brutal 'System' feel. NO completely rounded/pill buttons.

surface_strategies.cards: RETRO-FUTURISM / TERMINAL: backdrop-blur-md bg-black/40 border border-primary/30 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,229,255,0.05)] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.2)] hover:border-primary/60 transition-all duration-300
surface_strategies.system_modals: GLASSMORPHISM + GLOW: bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border-t-2 border-primary shadow-[0_10px_40px_rgba(0,229,255,0.15)]
surface_strategies.progress_bars: bg-slate-900 border border-primary/20. Fill should be bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-primary with a drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(0,229,255,0.8)]

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Hovering interactive elements should increase the cyan glow intensity and slightly lift the element (-translate-y-1).
motion_and_interactions.modals: Framer motion scale-up from 0.95 with slight opacity fade-in. Mimic a sudden 'System Alert' popup.
motion_and_interactions.level_up: Flash screen border, particle effects, scale typography up and down rapidly (pulse).

components_strategy.buttons: Sharp corners. Default: bg-primary/10 text-primary border border-primary/50 hover:bg-primary hover:text-black. Destructive: bg-destructive/10 text-destructive border border-destructive/50 hover:bg-destructive hover:text-white.
components_strategy.inputs: bg-black/50 border border-primary/30 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary text-primary font-mono
components_strategy.badges: bg-blue-900/40 text-primary border border-primary/40 font-mono uppercase text-xs px-2 py-1

image_urls.description: Dark holographic system window background texture, Solo leveling style. Use as an overlaid texture (low opacity, e.g., 5-10%) on the main app background to give depth.
Mysterious silhouette avatar with glowing blue eyes. Use in the user profile/stats dashboard section.
Epic glowing level up badge. Use this in the Level progression system or when an 'S-Rank' achievement is unlocked.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts 'Orbitron' and 'JetBrains Mono' via Google Web Fonts in index.html or global css.
Implement the entire UI in dark mode overriding default Tailwind slate colors with our deep black/blue theme (#05050A).
App must be a single-page React app focusing on: 1. Onboarding (System Initiation), 2. Dashboard (Player Stats: STR, AGI, INT, etc.), 3. Quest Log (Daily Quests).
Notifications should mimic 'System Messages' (e.g., 'A new daily quest has arrived').
Use Shadcn UI components but heavily customize them to strip out the 'Vercel look'. Apply glowing borders, sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm), and monospace fonts for data.
Use Framer Motion to make panels slide in or pop up like holographic projections.
Ensure the progress bar for XP looks like a classic RPG health/mana/xp bar: thick, glowing, with numerical text overlaid (e.g., '1450 / 2000 XP').

accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='daily-quest-complete-button').
accessibility.contrast: Ensure neon cyan text maintains adequate contrast against the dark background. Use text-shadow if needed.
